# STRAT.014 ? Drucker's Management by Objectives

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** business_strategy
**Domain:** BUSINESS_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Clear objectives; participative goal-setting; periodic review; performance evaluation; focus on results not activity

## Application
Set clear measurable goals; involve team in goal-setting; regular progress review; evaluate on outcomes; results orientation

## Key Values
- Clear objectives
- Participation
- Measurement
- Results focus
- Accountability

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, business_strategy

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
